channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Watch: Mickey Mouse Club reboot
item.description: ABC News' Will Ganss shares the day's most talked-about stories in 'GMA' Pop News.

item.title: Newsom's diaper contract was not competitively bid; California budget contains many similar exemptions.
item.description: Governor Newsom claimed a $6.2 million Baby2Baby contract was competitively bid, but state records show it was not.

item.title: Shippers face worst-case scenario as U.S. and Iran intensify attacks
item.description: An industry analyst says no one is willing to transit the Strait of Hormuz as hostilities between the U.S. and Iran escalate.

item.title: Mullin threatens to withhold aid from states not following DHS election directives
item.description: DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin warned states that federal election aid could be cut if they fail to comply with administration voting roll policies.
